options.content:
# .NET Service Health Monitoring

This dashboard provides real-time monitoring for .Net10 API using OpenTelemetry instrumentation.

## What you see here

- **Service Health**: Traffic, error rate, and latency with color-coded thresholds
- **RED Metrics**: Request rate, error rate (4xx/5xx), and response duration at ${percentile} percentile
- **.NET Runtime**: GC heap usage, exception rate, and thread pool queue depth
- **Kubernetes**: Pods distribution, pods lifecycle timeline, and running pod count

## Thresholds

- **Latency**: Green <250ms, Orange 300-500ms, Red >500ms (P95, to be adjusted by services)
- **Error Rate**: Green <2%, Orange 2-5%, Red >5% (to be adjusted by services)
- **Traffic**: Baseline monitoring (to be adjusted by services)

Use the variables at the top to filter by service, environment, and percentile.

spec.description: Error rate per http status code
spec.title: Error Rate

spec.description: Peak managed heap allocation rate per pod. High values indicate memory pressure and may trigger frequent GC collections, impacting latency.
spec.title: Peak GC Heap

spec.description: Peak managed heap allocation rate per pod. High values indicate memory pressure and may trigger frequent GC collections, impacting latency.
spec.title: Peak GC Heap

spec.description:
Count of exceptions that have been thrown in managed code, since the observation started. The value will be unavailable until an exception has been thrown after OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.Runtime initialization.

**Type:** *counter*
spec.title: Exceptions

spec.description:
Count of exceptions that have been thrown in managed code, since the observation started. The value will be unavailable until an exception has been thrown after OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.Runtime initialization.

**Type:** *counter*
spec.title: Exceptions

spec.description:
The number of work items that are currently queued to be processed by the thread pool.

**Type:** *gauge*
spec.title: Thread pool queue

spec.description: CPU used by the .NET API process on each pod
spec.title: CPU usage
